scaling_signals: Transitioning from LCL to FCL due to volume growth.
Shifting from air freight back to ocean to optimize cost-per-unit.
Scaling manufacturing in Northern Vietnam (Hai Phong area).
struggling_signals: High demurrage/detention costs due to clearance delays.
Capital tied up in 'safety stock' due to unreliable lead times.
Loss of retail contracts due to shipment unpredictability.
business_pain_points: Inventory tie-up due to transit unpredictability.
High insurance costs for premium components.

scaling_signals: Seasonal volume spikes requiring guaranteed space.
Shifting sourcing from China to Vietnam/India to benefit from FTAs.
Direct-to-Warehouse shipping models for UK retailers.
struggling_signals: Heavy fines from missed documentation deadlines.
Overpaying on air-freight to make up for manufacturing delays.
Redundant logistics costs due to lack of shipment consolidation.
business_pain_points: Meticulous HS Code classification leading to heavy fines if missed.
Compressed lead times for seasonal fashion launches.

import_to_uk.value_case: Specialized UK customs and fiscal representation.

signals: Regional forwarder needing UK 'Boots on the Ground'
Customs gap for specific industry Pharma/Textile

qualification_rules.tier_1_growth: Scaling volume needing professional FCL management.
qualification_rules.tier_1_fix: Supply chain failure needing urgent bridge or optimization.
qualification_rules.tier_1_partner: Regional agent seeking inter-lane partner for UK/EU legs.
qualification_rules.red_flag: One-off individual shippers without recurring volume.

logic_templates.propose_strategy_growth: Hi {{companyName}}, based on your scaling activity on the {{laneOrigin}} to {{laneDestination}} route, I've identified a margin opportunity through volume consolidation. Specifically, {{strategicCase}}. Would a comparison against your current setup be useful?
logic_templates.propose_strategy_fix: Hi {{companyName}}, analyzing your current shipping pattern on the {{laneOrigin}} to {{laneDestination}} route, there appears to be a significant cost-leak in your clearance cycle. We specialize in eliminating {{pain_point}} for companies in your industry. Interested in a brief technical review?
logic_templates.propose_partnership: Hi {{companyName}}, I noticed your focus on the {{laneOrigin}} to {{laneDestination}} trade. We are specialists in UK customs and last-mile for {{industry}}. I believe our infrastructure would perfectly complement your regional operations. Are you open to a partnership discussion?
